'''shakogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnoconidium|pycnoconidium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnoconidium|pycnoconidium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shakogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shækegeth|shækegeth]] || [[word:shækegej|shækegej]] || [[word:shækegesh|shækegesh]] || [[word:shækege|shækege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakokogoth|shakokogoth]] || [[word:shakokogoj|shakokogoj]] || [[word:shakokogosh|shakokogosh]] || [[word:shakokogo|shakokogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakogoth|shakogoth]] || [[word:shakogoj|shakogoj]] || [[word:shakogosh|shakogosh]] || [[word:shakogo|shakogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakofgoth|shakofgoth]] || [[word:shakofgoj|shakofgoj]] || [[word:shakofgosh|shakofgosh]] || [[word:shakofgof|shakofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shakogotho|shakogotho]] || [[word:shakogojo|shakogojo]] || [[word:shakogosho|shakogosho]] || [[word:shakogoko|shakogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shakogoth|shakogoth]] || [[word:shakogoj|shakogoj]] || [[word:shakogosh|shakogosh]] || [[word:shakogo|shakogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shakogothol|shakogothol]] || [[word:shakogojol|shakogojol]] || [[word:shakogoshol|shakogoshol]] || [[word:shakogokol|shakogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shakogothotho|shakogothotho]] || [[word:shakogojojo|shakogojojo]] || [[word:shakogoshosho|shakogoshosho]] || [[word:shakogoko|shakogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shakogothon|shakogothon]] || [[word:shakogojon|shakogojon]] || [[word:shakogoshon|shakogoshon]] || [[word:shakogokon|shakogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shakogothoro|shakogothoro]] || [[word:shakogojoro|shakogojoro]] || [[word:shakogoshoro|shakogoshoro]] || [[word:shakogokoro|shakogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
